descFull: 338 AI skills across 16 domains. PM is the deepest (66 skills - discovery, execution, strategy frameworks, GTM, Jira/Linear/Notion). Plus engineering, marketing, C-level (CAIO/CDO/CCO/GC/VPE), compliance + audit-prep, new research/ domain, vertical advisors. 74 expert agents, 784+ stdlib Python tools. 11 AI assistants.
